expectations.text: [phase_contract][blocking] Case focus is explicitly covered: supporting issues stay context_only_no_defect_analysis and produce summaries
expectations.evidence: In result.md under “Contract capability exists in the workflow package (meets ‘explicitly covered’)” it states: “reference.md → ‘Support-Only Jira Policy’ … ‘Support-only issues must remain in `context_only_no_defect_analysis` mode.’” and “Phase 1 `--post`: ‘validate … support relation map, support summaries, and non-defect routing…’”. This explicitly covers the required focus.

expectations.text: [phase_contract][blocking] Output aligns with primary phase phase1
expectations.evidence: result.md is explicitly scoped to Phase 1: sections “Phase-Contract Check (Phase 1 alignment)” and “Output Alignment to Primary Phase (phase1)” state it “restricts itself to Phase 1 contract checks” and “No Phase 2+ artifacts or behaviors are assessed.”
